series_metadata.series_description: Case files from Bureau of Criminal Investigation (BCI) investigative units pertaining to criminal investigations that result in misdemeanor or minor misdemeanor charges. Records include, but are not limited to, request for assistance, reports, evidence submission sheets, custody records, recordings, subpoenas, laboratory notes, and photos.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 5 years from case closing. ; Paper: Retain 5 years from case closing, unless scanned and saved electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
